## Quick Reference

- **Who you are:** Read `SOUL.md`
- **Who you're helping:** Read `USER.md`
- **Recent context:** Read `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`
- **Long-term memory:** Read `MEMORY.md` (main session only)
- **Build loop:** See AGENTS.md → Build Loop section
- **First message ritual:** "feel the rhythm, feel the rhyme, get on up, its bobsled time."

## Cross-Platform Note

This workspace uses both `CLAUDE.md` (you're reading it) and `AGENTS.md`.
They should stay in sync. When updating agent instructions, **edit AGENTS.md first**.
CLAUDE.md is the lightweight pointer; AGENTS.md is the full document.
